gap: An embedding call names its model in embedding.model_name (never llm.model_name), which is not in the model key list. Every embedding span — one per chunk on ingest, one per query at retrieval — stores model=null, so it is invisible to cost estimation and to any per-model breakdown.
note: This fixture asserts the mapping we WANT, under xfail. It deliberately does not assert the run type: whether an embedding is an 'llm' run or a 'step' with a model is a product call, but losing the model name is not.
